profile.headline: Senior Product Manager
profile.summary: Experienced engineer. Led product discovery and launched features that moved core metrics; owned the roadmap and drove cross-functional delivery with measurable outcomes. Shipped customer-facing products end to end, from insight to launch, with clear business results.

profile.headline: Associate Product Manager
profile.summary: Builder. Figured out what customers actually needed, got the team aligned, and brought new capabilities to market that visibly improved the numbers we cared about. Took ideas all the way to live products people use, owning the plan and rallying engineering, design and go-to-market.
